subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 706536788/230523509 is not a GRB
body:
A. von Kienlin (MPE) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 706536788/230523509 at
12:13:03 UT 
on 23 May 2023, tentatively classified as GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. 
This trigger is due to a Solar Flare."
